title: cyperus subtenax
intro: Cyperus subtenax, also known as the purple papyrus or purple sedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus subtenax are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestion. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
